mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.movie_id, s.no, s.start_at, s.end_at, s.activation,
mv.movie_id AS mv_movie_id, mv.title AS mv_title, mv.runtime AS mv_runtime, mv.actors as mv_actors, mv.director as mv_director, mv.rating as mv_rating, mv.genre as mv_genre, mv.description as mv_description, mv.create_at AS mv_create_at, mv.start_at AS mv_start_at, mv.end_at AS mv_end_at,
th.no AS th_no, th.policy_id AS th_policy_id, th.cleanup_time AS th_cleanup_time,
sp.policy_id AS th_sp_policy_id, sp.name AS th_sp_name, sp.cost AS th_sp_cost
FROM cinema_kiosk.schedule s INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.movie mv ON s.movie_id = mv.movie_id INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.theater th ON s.no = th.no INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.seat_policy sp ON th.policy_id = sp.policy_id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT sc.id, sc.movie_id, sc.no, sc.start_at, sc.end_at, sc.activation,
mv.movie_id AS mv_movie_id, mv.title AS mv_title, mv.runtime AS mv_runtime, mv.actors as mv_actors, mv.director as mv_director, mv.rating as mv_rating, mv.genre as mv_genre, mv.description as mv_description, mv.create_at AS mv_create_at, mv.start_at AS mv_start_at, mv.end_at AS mv_end_at,
th.no AS th_no, th.policy_id AS th_policy_id, th.cleanup_time AS th_cleanup_time,
sp.policy_id AS th_sp_policy_id, sp.name AS th_sp_name, sp.cost AS th_sp_cost
FROM cinema_kiosk.schedule sc INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.movie mv ON sc.movie_id = mv.movie_id INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.theater th ON sc.no = th.no INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.seat_policy sp ON th.policy_id = sp.policy_id
